testcase.name: Levenshtein Distance > should return 0 for identical strings
Levenshtein Distance > should return correct distance for single substitution
Levenshtein Distance > should return correct distance for single deletion
Levenshtein Distance > should return correct distance for single insertion
Levenshtein Distance > should return correct distance for completely different strings
Levenshtein Distance > should be case-sensitive
Levenshtein Distance > should handle empty strings
Entity Type Resolution > should resolve exact entity type matches
Entity Type Resolution > should resolve case-insensitive entity types
Entity Type Resolution > should resolve entity type aliases
Entity Type Resolution > should resolve fuzzy entity type matches within distance 3
Entity Type Resolution > should return null for very distant strings
Entity Type Resolution > should prefer exact match over fuzzy match
Entity Type Resolution > should trim whitespace
Instrument Type Resolution > should resolve exact instrument types
Instrument Type Resolution > should resolve instrument aliases
Instrument Type Resolution > should resolve orchestral instruments to gakki
Instrument Type Resolution > should handle fuzzy instrument matching
Instrument Type Resolution > should return null for unknown instruments
Gakki Preset Resolution > should handle synonym lookups
Gakki Preset Resolution > should return undefined for unknown instrument names
Gakki Preset Resolution > should normalize input (lowercase, underscores)
Gakki Preset Resolution > should resolve direct GM name lookups when data available
Gakki Preset Resolution > should prioritize orchestralVoice over instrument in hints
ABC Notation Parsing > should parse valid ABC notation and return notes
ABC Notation Parsing > should sort notes by positionTicks
ABC Notation Parsing > should use default velocity of 0.7 when volume not specified
ABC Notation Parsing > should enforce minimum duration of TICKS_QUARTER/4
ABC Notation Parsing > should return empty array or throw on empty input
ABC Notation Parsing > should clamp pitch to 0-127 range
Style Recommendation > should recommend bassline for Daft Punk
Style Recommendation > should recommend machiniste for drum keywords
Style Recommendation > should recommend heisenberg for pads and chords
Style Recommendation > should recommend tonematrix for sequences and arpeggios
Style Recommendation > should default to heisenberg for unknown styles
Style Recommendation > should be case-insensitive
Tick Constants > should have correct TICKS_WHOLE value
Tick Constants > should have correct TICKS_QUARTER value
Tick Constants > should have TICKS_WHOLE = 4 * TICKS_QUARTER
Audio Output Field Mapping > should map heisenberg to audioOutput
Audio Output Field Mapping > should map machiniste to mainOutput
Audio Output Field Mapping > should map beatbox8 to mainOutput
Audio Output Field Mapping > should map audioSplitter to audioOutput1
Audio Output Field Mapping > should map bandSplitter to highOutput
connectDeviceToStagebox > should create mixer channel and cable for known entity types
connectDeviceToStagebox > should not create anything for unknown entity types
connectDeviceToStagebox > should not create anything if output field has no location
connectDeviceToStagebox > should use machiniste mainOutput field
connectDeviceToStagebox > should calculate correct orderAmongStrips with existing strips
setHeisenbergOperatorAGain > should update operator A gain field
setHeisenbergOperatorAGain > should handle missing operatorA gracefully
Constants Integrity > should have all NOTE_TRACK_INSTRUMENTS in VALID_ENTITY_TYPES
Constants Integrity > should have all ENTITY_TYPE_ALIASES pointing to valid types
Constants Integrity > should have all INSTRUMENT_ALIASES pointing to valid note track instruments or gakki/heisenberg
Constants Integrity > should have all AUDIO_OUTPUT_FIELD keys be valid entity types or known types
Constants Integrity > should have all STYLE_MAP values pointing to valid entity types
MCP Server > should initialize without crashing
TokenManager > getToken returns accessToken if not expired
TokenManager > getToken refreshes token if expired
testcase.system-err:
[TokenManager] Refreshing access token...
[TokenManager] Access token refreshed successfully [TokenManager] Token will expire at: 2026-03-31T22:39:22.185Z

testcase.name: TokenManager > getToken throws error if expired and no refresh token
TokenManager > should deduplicate simultaneous refresh requests
testcase.system-err:
[TokenManager] Refreshing access token...
[TokenManager] Access token refreshed successfully [TokenManager] Token will expire at: 2026-03-31T22:39:22.186Z

testcase.name: TokenManager > should handle OAuth error response from refresh
TokenManager > should trigger refresh at the expiry buffer boundary (60s)
testcase.system-err:
[TokenManager] Refreshing access token...
[TokenManager] Access token refreshed successfully [TokenManager] Token will expire at: 2026-03-31T23:39:22.187Z

testcase.name: TokenManager > should update expiresAt correctly after refresh
testcase.system-err:
[TokenManager] Refreshing access token...
[TokenManager] Access token refreshed successfully [TokenManager] Token will expire at: 2026-03-31T23:39:22.188Z

testcase.name: TokenManager > should use rotated refresh token for subsequent refreshes
testcase.system-err:
[TokenManager] Refreshing access token...
[TokenManager] Access token refreshed successfully [TokenManager] Token will expire at: 2026-03-31T21:39:23.188Z
[TokenManager] Refreshing access token...
[TokenManager] Access token refreshed successfully [TokenManager] Token will expire at: 2026-03-31T23:39:22.188Z

testcase.name: TokenManager > should throw on HTTP error from token endpoint
TokenManager > isValid returns true when token is not expired
TokenManager > isValid returns false when token is within expiry buffer
